name: Crab Stuffed Chicken Breasts
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin and bone the chicken breasts; pound to flatten.
2. Sprinkle with a little salt and pepper.
3. Cook onion and celery in 3 tablespoons butter until tender.
4. Remove from heat; add 3 tablespoons wine, crabmeat, and stuffing mix, then toss.
5. Divide mixture among breasts and roll up, securing each one.
6. Combine flour, paprika; coat the chicken.
7. Place in a 11-inch X 7-inch X 2-inch baking dish, drizzle with 2 tablespoons melted butter.
8. Bake uncovered at 375 degrees for 1 hour.
9. Transfer to platter.
10. Blend Hollandaise sauce mix and milk, cook stirring until thick.
11. Add remaining wine and cheese; stir until cheese melts.
12. Serve over chicken.
